channel.title: DevRa on My blog
channel.description: Recent content in DevRa on My blog

item.title: Improved Oral Hygiene
item.description: There are several advantages to using an electric toothbrush over a manual toothbrush, including: Improved Oral Hygiene: Electric toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth more effectively and remove plaque and bacteria more thoroughly than manual toothbrushes.

item.title: Chords for Happy Birthday
item.description: C G Happy birthday to you G C Happy birthday to you C F Happy birthday dear BlogRa C Bdim C Happy birthday to you

item.title: Placeholder Text
item.description: Lorem est tota propiore conpellat pectoribus de pectora summo.

item.title: Rich Content
item.description: Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.

item.title: Write Math Equations
item.description: Write math equations with ease. At first enable math:true in front matter. Then write this- $$ \varphi = \dfrac{1+\sqrt5}{2}= 1.6180339887… $$ to produce this- $$ \varphi = \dfrac{1+\sqrt5}{2}= 1.

item.title: Make Diagrams with Mermaid
item.description: Mermaid is an awesome software engineering diagramming tool. Write markdowns like this- graph TD A[Client] --> B[Load Balancer] B --> C[Server01] B --> D[Server02] to generate diagrams like this-

item.title: Emoji Support
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.

item.title: About
item.description: ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Click me to reveal my email. Don’t spam or I will kidnap your cat.English
